name: harness.debug_spawn_follower_npc_target_state_audit_mcw
description: Audit one debug-spawn follower NPC primitive end-to-end under the proof-freeze rules: spawn one random follower NPC through the debug follower path, prove the case-sensitive save/writeback gate, then require same-run saved-overmap NPC metadata for a nearby follower. This is harness primitive/process evidence, not product-feature proof.

steps.label: debug_spawn_one_follower_npc
steps.preconditions: canonical dev-harness/McWilliams fixture is loaded and focused; debug spawn follower NPC primitive starts from the main map screen
steps.expected_visible_fact: debug spawn follower helper returns to the live map after creating one random follower NPC
steps.expected_immediate_state: one nearby overmap NPC should be persisted as a follower, but this row is credited only through the later same-run saved-overmap NPC metadata gate
steps.failure_rule: debug menu wrong-screen, stale runtime, or missing same-run saved-overmap follower metadata after save makes this debug-spawn row non-green
steps.next_step_gate: do not credit the debug-spawn follower NPC primitive unless audit_saved_overmap_npcs_after_debug_spawn is green

steps.label: audit_player_save_mtime_before_debug_spawn_npc_save
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved-player file mtime baseline is recorded after debug spawn follower NPC and before the save/writeback request

steps.label: open_save_prompt_after_debug_spawn_npc
steps.abort_reason: screen text did not prove the case-sensitive Save and quit prompt before confirming the debug-spawn follower NPC save
steps.expected_visible_fact: the case-sensitive Save and quit prompt is open after the debug-spawn follower NPC step; confirmation must not be sent before this prompt is proven

steps.label: confirm_save_after_debug_spawn_npc
steps.failure_rule: uppercase-Y confirmation is only trusted if the following saved-player mtime gate proves same-run writeback
steps.next_step_gate: saved overmap NPC metadata may be credited only when audit_player_save_mtime_after_debug_spawn_npc_save is green
steps.expected_visible_fact: the proven case-sensitive save prompt is confirmed with uppercase Y so the following mtime gate can prove same-run writeback

steps.label: audit_player_save_mtime_after_debug_spawn_npc_save
steps.abort_reason: saved-player file mtime did not advance after confirming the debug-spawn follower NPC save
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved-player file mtime advanced after the confirmed debug-spawn follower NPC save, proving the following overmap NPC audit reads same-run state

steps.label: audit_saved_overmap_npcs_after_debug_spawn
steps.abort_reason: saved overmap NPC metadata did not contain a nearby follower NPC after same-run debug-spawn save/writeback
steps.expected_visible_fact: same-run saved overmap NPC metadata contains a nearby follower NPC after the debug-spawn follower primitive
